entry.title: IDC W900KK23D0001 (P00010) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ACTION INCORPORATES UTILITY HELICOPTER (UH)-60M CONSIDERATION AGREEMENT AND DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENTS IN SUPPORT OF FLIGHT SCHOOL TRAINING SUPPORT SERVICES (FSTSS) CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

entry.title: IDC W900KK23D0001 (P00011) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE ATTACHMENTS 27-33 IN SECTION J AND INCORPORATE ARMY CONTRACTING WRITING SYSTEM LANGUAGE IN SECTION H IN SUPPORT OF FLIGHT SCHOOL TRAINING SUPPORT SERVICES CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- TRAINING AIDS AND DEVICES

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATION OF UTILITY HELICOPTER (UH)-60L CONTINUED WEEKEND TRAINING AGREEMENT IN SUPPORT OF THE FLIGHT SCHOOL TRAINING SUPPORT SERVICES PROGRAM.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

entry.title: IDC W900KK23D0001 (P00013) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: EXERCISING LOT YEAR III CONTRACT LINE-ITEM NUMBERS (CLINS) AND INCORPORATING INTEGRATED MASTER SCHEDULE (IMS) IN SUPPORT OF FLIGHT SCHOOL TRAINING SUPPORT SERVICES (FSTSS).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CONTRACTOR-PROVIDED TRAINING SIMULATION SERVICES FOR TRAINING HELICOPTER (TH)-1H, UTILITY HELICOPTER (UH)- 72A, UH-60L, UH-60M, CARGO HELICOPTER (CH)-47F, ATTACK HELICOPTER (AH)-64E INSTRUMENT AND OPERATIONAL FLIGHT TRAINING SYSTEMS (OFTS).
